base.description: Walkable ground variants - subtle hue shifts

furnished.description: Walkable detailed tiles - matter, debris, decorations

blocking.description: Non-walkable obstacles with 3D height (rocks, statues, props)

tileFormat.id: string - unique tile identifier (e.g. cryo_B1, inf_F7, vnt_P3)
tileFormat.name: string - display name (e.g. CRACKED, LAVA POOL, FIREWALL)
tileFormat.walkable: boolean - true for base/furnished, false for blocking
tileFormat.bgFill: string - SVG fill (gradient url or solid color) for the base tile diamond
tileFormat.bgTopFill: string (optional) - SVG fill for the top half overlay (used by base tiles to add highlight)
tileFormat.svg: string - SVG body content rendered ON TOP of the base diamond, centered at (0,0)

rendering.description: Tiles are rendered in iso projection. The base diamond goes from (-60,8) to (60,8) horizontally and (0,-22) to (0,38) vertically, centered at (0,8). Origin (0,0) is the top center of the tile face.
renderOrder: 3. Top half overlay if tile.bgTopFill exists
rendering.assemblyExample: <svg viewBox='-60 -55 120 90'><defs>${biome.defs}</defs><polygon points='0,8 60,8 0,38 -60,8' fill='#000' opacity='0.5' transform='translate(2,2)'/><polygon points='0,-22 60,8 0,38 -60,8' fill='${tile.bgFill}'/>${tile.bgTopFill ? `<polygon points='0,-22 60,8 0,8 -60,8' fill='${tile.bgTopFill}'/>` : ''}<polygon points='0,-22 60,8 0,38 -60,8' fill='none' stroke='${biome.config.strokeColor}' stroke-width='0.5'/>${tile.svg}</svg>
